hooks.command: input=$(cat); name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.name // empty'); name=${name:-$(openssl rand -hex 4)}; branch="worktree-$name"; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); dir="$root/worktrees/$name"; if [ -d "$dir" ]; then existing_branch=$(git -C "$dir" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); echo "{\"worktreePath\": \"$dir\", \"branch\": \"$existing_branch\"}"; else mkdir -p "$root/worktrees" && git worktree add "$dir" -b "$branch" && echo "{\"worktreePath\": \"$dir\", \"branch\": \"$branch\"}"; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.worktreePath // empty'); branch=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.branch // empty'); [ -n "$path" ] && git worktree remove "$path" 2>/dev/null; [ -n "$branch" ] && git branch -D "$branch" 2>/dev/null; echo '{}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r filepath; if [[ "$filepath" =~ (design/(plans|specs)|.agents/skills) ]]; then filename=$(basename "$filepath"); if ! [[ "$filename" =~ ^(done|backlog|in_progress|waiting|deployed|archived|paused)_ ]]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Status prefix required: File in design artifacts must start with status prefix (done_, backlog_, in_progress_, waiting_, deployed_, archived_, paused_). Example: backlog_2026-03-29-my-plan.md"}'; exit 1; fi; fi; echo '{}'; }
